top_signals.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
top_signals.summary: Gold rose slightly as investors assessed mixed signals about the possibility of a US-Iran ceasefire deal, while also weighing the odds that elevated energy prices will prompt central banks to keep interest rates higher for longer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ohio man sentenced to 9 years for running $10 million crypto Ponzi scheme
top_signals.summary: The CFTC filed an enforcement action against Rathnakishore Giri in August 2022 for running the fraudulent investment scheme.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
